summary: WIN-021.c3 moderate hole closed by EXP-326. Single string_replace patch on data/wins.json ["021"].detail_evidence: replaces the one-sentence qualitative response to the rad/s²-as-acceleration defender retreat with a four-sentence response that (1) acknowledges the τ=Iα framing as real classical mechanics (kernel), (2) quantitatively falsifies via IAU 2006 P_03 secular acceleration ≈10⁻²⁴ rad/s² vs dome 4.87×10⁻¹² rad/s² (~12 OOM gap), (3) flags ~2×10⁷ runaway-per-year consequence VLBI/LLR would have caught, (4) notes dome page text labels claim as a rate (not acceleration), making the reframe a defender retreat not anchored in the published claim. review_class=verification (batchable with neighbors). Verdict unchanged (Misleading).
